---
title: "Ramon N. Rayas"
description: "AI research scientist"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/onalix
---

The purpose of this journal is to explore machine learning algorithms and research ideas, and share some of my technical notes and personal projects.

Start reading my [journal entries](journal.qmd).
